source: Adapted from 情绪导演 Skill V2.x + film acting practice
principles: No literary metaphor — only shootable physical description
Emotion becomes face muscles, breath, hands, spine, gaze
Micro-actions always present; freeze-face is forbidden
Director unifies: beat + performance + shot size + camera move + light
Actor-free version only names emotion intensity; director-guided writes the body

calm.physiology_zh: 呼吸平稳，肩线放松，眨眼节奏自然，视线缓慢扫过环境，嘴角无用力
calm.physiology_en: steady breath, relaxed shoulders, natural blink rhythm, gaze slowly scans the space, mouth soft without tension
micro_actions_en: occasional light touch of a prop
calm.gaze: 环境扫描或与对方自然对视
calm.gaze_en: scans environment or holds natural eye contact

suspicion.physiology_zh: 眉心微聚，眨眼间隔变长，下颌轻咬，肩膀略抬，手指无意识摩挲
suspicion.physiology_en: brows slightly drawn, longer blink gaps, jaw lightly clenched, shoulders a bit raised, fingers unconsciously rub
micro_actions: 视线在对方眼睛与嘴之间快速切换
micro_actions_en: eyes dart between the other person's eyes and mouth
body eases half a step back
suspicion.gaze: 试探性对视，间歇躲闪再回看
suspicion.gaze_en: probing eye contact, brief breaks then return
suspicion.voice_hint: 低声，语速略慢，句尾压住
suspicion.voice_hint_en: low voice, slightly slow, endings pressed down

intensity_scale_en.high: almost sure of betrayal, still controlled

oppression.physiology_zh: 胸腔起伏变浅或变沉，肩向内收，颈部僵硬，嘴唇抿紧，指节发白
oppression.physiology_en: chest rises shallow or heavy, shoulders pull inward, neck stiff, lips pressed tight, knuckles pale
micro_actions: 后退碰到障碍仍无处可退
micro_actions_en: steps back into a barrier with nowhere left
oppression.gaze: 被压者视线偏低或被迫仰视；施压者稳定直视
oppression.gaze_en: pressed character looks lower or forced to look up; presser holds steady stare
oppression.voice_hint_en: lowered voice, short lines, longer pauses

revelation.physiology_zh: 瞳孔明显放大，上眼睑抬起眼白增多，嘴巴微张，身体瞬间僵直，短时间几乎不眨眼
revelation.physiology_en: pupils clearly widen, upper lids lift with more eye white, mouth slightly open, body freezes for a beat, almost no blink
micro_actions: 先僵住再极小幅度后仰
micro_actions_en: breath stops half a beat then returns
revelation.gaze: 死盯信息源（人眼/物件）再缓慢失焦或回神
revelation.gaze_en: locks on the source of truth then slowly softens or returns
revelation.voice_hint: 先气音或失声，再低声确认
revelation.voice_hint_en: first breathy or nearly silent, then low confirmation

intimacy.physiology_zh: 眼睑略低垂，视线缓慢扫过对方面部，嘴角轻微上扬，身体不自觉倾向对方
intimacy.physiology_en: lids slightly lowered, gaze slowly traces the other's face, soft smile at mouth corners, body leans in without thinking
micro_actions: 手指轻触对方衣角或桌面缩短距离
micro_actions_en: fingers brush cloth or table to close distance
intimacy.gaze_en: soft mutual gaze, occasional drop of eyes
intimacy.voice_hint_en: low voice, optional breathiness, slow pace

grief.physiology_zh: 眼睑缓慢下垂，下眼睑湿润反光，嘴角明显下拉，肩膀向内收，头部低垂
grief.physiology_en: lids slowly sink, lower lids wet with catchlight, mouth corners pull down, shoulders cave in, head drops
grief.gaze_en: drops, goes soft, avoids eye contact

dread.physiology_zh: 瞳孔扩大，眼白暴露增多，胸口快速起伏，手指轻微颤抖，身体向后缩紧
dread.physiology_en: pupils enlarge, more eye white, chest rises fast, fingers tremble lightly, body tightens backward
dread.gaze_en: fixed on threat or cannot look

compound_notes.shame_anger: 面部泛红同时下颌咬紧，视线躲闪又突然顶回去
compound_notes.bittersweet: 嘴角上扬同时眼眶湿润
compound_notes.inertia: 情绪切换后 3-5 秒保留前一情绪的呼吸/颤抖残留，禁止瞬间清零
